---
title: "Spatial IV Experimental Models"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("30-spatial-2sls-model-attempts.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 30: exploratory spatial-IV comments")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("This note intentionally mirrors the benchmark notebook rather than adding a second interpretation. It exists as the exploratory analysis landing page for the legacy eval=FALSE spatial-IV work.")
```

## Current targets-backed result

```{r status, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_model_status.csv"), "Spatial-IV model status")
```
